message:
论文晨报｜微电子材料 / 晶体管（2026-04-17）
来源：arXiv / Science Advances / Nature Electronics / Nature Materials
今天暂时没刷到新的高相关论文。
以下继续展示近7天内仍在窗口中的论文。

papers.title: A CMOS-compatible, scalable and compact magnetoelectric spin-torque microwave detector
papers.summary: The development of compact and highly sensitive microwave detectors compatible with complementary-metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) processes is an active research area but remains a major challenge in microwave technology.
papers.abstract_cn: 该摘要主要介绍了一种兼容 CMOS 工艺、可扩展且紧凑的磁电自旋转矩微波探测器。

papers.title: Sub-nm range momentum-dependent exciton transfer from a 2D semiconductor to graphene
papers.summary: Van der Waals heterostructures made from atomically thin transition metal dichalcogenides and graphene are studied for interfacial charge and energy transfer.
papers.abstract_cn: 该摘要主要研究二维半导体与石墨烯异质结构中的激子转移行为。

papers.title: Thermal Characterization of Buried Interfaces in Multilayer Heterostructures via TDTR with Periodic Waveform Analysis
papers.summary: A frequency-tunable TDTR approach is used to characterize buried thermal interfaces in multilayer semiconductor heterostructures.
papers.abstract_cn: 该摘要主要介绍了一种用于多层异质结构埋藏界面热学表征的周期波形分析 TDTR 方法。

papers.title: Automatic Charge State Tuning of 300 mm FDSOI Quantum Dots Using Neural Network Segmentation of Charge Stability Diagram
papers.summary: A deep-learning-driven semantic segmentation pipeline is proposed for automatic charge-state tuning of silicon quantum dots on 300 mm FDSOI devices.
papers.abstract_cn: 该摘要主要介绍了一种基于神经网络分割的 300 mm FDSOI 量子点电荷态自动调谐方法。
